name: @shidesheng0218/repo-ready
description: Make your repo ready for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and contributors.

scripts.lint: node --check packages/cli/bin/repoready.js && node --check packages/core/src/index.js && node --check packages/core/src/analyze-readme.js && node --check packages/core/src/analyze-dependencies.js && node --check packages/core/src/analyze-safety.js && node --check packages/core/src/analyze-tasks.js && node --check packages/core/src/ai-enhancer.js && node --check packages/core/src/ai-strategy.js
